title: Cre8 Glossy Paper Square Shapes 15.5cm, Assorted Colours - 100 Sheets

With a fantastic glossy coating these shiny sheets are sure to be loved by any crafting guru or child! Don't miss the other shapes in this range - glossy squares and glossy circles.
